zh.lifeSummary: 當John Coney於1445年出生在英國林可爾史爾吉爾頓時，他的父親Godfrey Coney25歲，母親Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike23歲。他於1470年與Katherine Tiedkt在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1482年7月30日享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Coney于1445年出生在英国林可爾史爾吉爾頓时，他的父亲Godfrey Coney25岁，母亲Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike23岁。他于1470年与Katherine Tiedkt在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1482年7月30日享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English cony ‘rabbit’ (a back-formation from conies, from Old French conis, plural of conil), perhaps for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way or who wore rabbit skin or who sold rabbits or their skins. One York trader with this name in 1323 was a peleter or furrier.

variants.name: Cunning
meanings: Irish and Scottish (Fife): variant of Scottish or English Conning, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French coning ‘rabbit’, used for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way; perhaps also an occupational name for a furrier. See also Coney .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Coney was born in 1445, in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Godfrey Coney, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, was 23. He married Katherine Tiedkt in 1470, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 30 July 1482, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Coney est né en 1445, à Kirton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Godfrey Coney, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Tiedkt en 1470, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 juillet 1482, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Coney 1445 in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godfrey Coney 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike 23. Er hat 1470 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Tiedkt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Juli 1482 im Alter von 37 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Coney è nato il nel 1445 nel Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Godfrey Coney, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Tiedkt nel 1470, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 30 luglio 1482, all'età di 37 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Coney(이)가 1445년 영국 링코실르 커턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godfrey Coney(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Katherine Tiedkt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1482년 7월 30일 37세의 나이로 사망했다.
